final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire preset,
    input wire en,
    output reg [2:0] count
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge preset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (preset) begin
            count <= 3'b111;
        end else if (en) begin
            count <= count - 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
